mapper.insert: INSERT INTO challenge(user_id, start_date, end_date, target, description, status) VALUES(#{userId}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{target}, #{description}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM challenge WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM challenge WHERE id = #{id} and user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE challenge SET status = 'ONGOING' WHERE status = 'READY' AND start_date <= #{today}
UPDATE challenge SET status = 'SUCCESS' WHERE status = 'ONGOING' AND id = #{challengeId}
